# Stone House Nevada City
> Historic 1857 stone wedding and event venue in Nevada City, California — seven unique spaces, elevated cuisine, capacity up to 300 guests.

## Site
- [Home](https://www.stonehouse.io/): Overview, hero gallery, lead capture
- [Wedding Pricing](https://www.stonehouse.io/wedding-pricing): Wedding pricing pamphlet download
- [Real Weddings](https://www.stonehouse.io/weddings/): Photo galleries from past weddings
- [Private Events](https://www.stonehouse.io/private-events/): Private event packages
- [Corporate Events](https://www.stonehouse.io/corporate-events/): Corporate event packages
- [Contact](https://www.stonehouse.io/contact/): Contact info and booking inquiries
- [Floor Plans](https://www.stonehouse.io/floor-plans.html): Venue floor plans
- [Menus](https://www.stonehouse.io/menus.html): Wedding menu pricing tiers
- [Blog](https://www.stonehouse.io/blog.html): Stories from Stone House

## Contact
- Email: bookings@stonehouse.io
- Phone: +1 (530) 265-5050
- Address: 107 Sacramento Street, Nevada City, CA 95959, USA
